subtitles.original: メンバーシップの方に加入していただければと思います。
subtitles.english: I hope you'll consider joining my membership!

subtitles.original: 今日ね、お昼くらいにメンバーの方が使えるスタンプが追加されましたので、
subtitles.english: Today around noon, we added some stamps that members can use,

subtitles.original: ぜひコメント欄で、よかったら使ってみてください。
subtitles.english: so please try using them in the chat if you'd like.

subtitles.original: もうみんな使いたくてたまらない、アロワナスタンプとかが追加されてるんで、
subtitles.english: We've added an arowana stamp that everyone has been dying to use!

subtitles.original: ぜひ皆さんね、コメント欄いっぱいアロワナを泳がせてください。
subtitles.english: So please make lots of arowanas swim in the chat!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします。
さあということで、お衣装、改めて新衣装なんですが、
subtitles.english: So, once again, about this new outfit...

subtitles.original: 今回衣装のほかに、ちょっとね、ひとつ、とあるものを作りましたよ。
subtitles.english: Beside the outfit itself, I actually had one special item made!

subtitles.original: 楽曲中にもね、出てきたんですけれども、
subtitles.english: It also appeared during the song earlier, but...

subtitles.original: じゃんじゃかじゃんじゃんじゃん、あ、逆！じゃーん！
ステッキでございます！
いいでしょう、これ？かっこいいでしょう？
subtitles.english: Isn't it great? It looks so cool, right?

subtitles.original: 今回ね、特注でステッキ、作っちゃったー！
subtitles.english: I had this cane custom-made for this occasion!

subtitles.original: しかも！これだけじゃないんですよ。
うわー！レーザービームだ！すごい！
subtitles.english: Wow! It's a laser beam! Incredible!

subtitles.original: 今回ね、あの、レーザービームを出せるようにしてもらいました。
subtitles.english: This time, I asked them to make it shoot a laser beam.

subtitles.original: ヴン ヴン ヴン ヴン...
もう大丈夫です。疲れちゃう。
subtitles.english: Okay, that's enough. I'll get tired.

subtitles.original: いや、もう今日はね、ライブまだまだこれからですので、体力は温存していかないと。
subtitles.english: No, the live show has just started today, so I need to save my energy.

subtitles.original: でも今日は、自分の体力がもう空っぽになるまで、
subtitles.english: But today, I'm going to perform with everything I've got

subtitles.original: 全力でライブするから、みんな応援よろしくね！
subtitles.english: until my stamina is completely empty! Please cheer me on!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ、次の曲にいきたいと思います。
subtitles.english: Now, I think it's about time to move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: さあ次の曲はなんなのか、重大発表とはなんなのか、ワクワクしながら聞いてくださいね。
subtitles.english: I wonder what the next song is, and what the major announcement is? Please listen with excitement!

subtitles.original: そしてここからはゲストも登場します！
subtitles.english: And we also have guests appearing from here on!

subtitles.original: ゲストパートは収録になりますので、あしからず。
subtitles.english: Please note that the guest part is pre-recorded.

subtitles.original: それでは、今宵はまだまだ始まったばかり。みんなで一緒に楽しみましょう！
subtitles.english: Now, tonight has only just begun. Let's all have fun together!

subtitles.original: そう高く 果てなく

subtitles.english: it will guide us to tomorrow.
I want to shine my own unique light.
I just lock up my heart,
plugging my ears to the echo
The truth is, I always knew

subtitles.original: 無限に広がる宇宙(そら)

subtitles.english: Even if I close my eyes

subtitles.original: 言い聞かせてみたってもう
そう高く 果てなく

subtitles.english: I want to shine my own unique light.
I won't lose sight of it,
Even if it's a detour, it's fine.
Let's march forward with our heads held high.

subtitles.original: でも傷ついたって構わないよ
subtitles.english: but I don't care if I get hurt.

subtitles.original: 生きたいプライド私らしく
subtitles.english: I want to live my pride as myself.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation for Japanese YouTube Segment**

Okay, so the task at hand is to generate accurate subtitles for a Japanese YouTube video segment. First, I need to clarify some details. The initial reference indicated "Raora Panthera" but it looks like it's Juufuutei Raden from hololive ReGloss. Let's make sure this is noted, given the initial text was slightly inaccurate. It's Juufuutei Raden. Got it. Now, the plan is to manually transcribe and translate the segment.

First, I will tackle the talk segment from 00:00 to 02:19. Then, I'll transcribe and translate the song "DIVE!" from 02:20 to the end. I'll make sure the transcriptions are as accurate as possible, and the translations flow correctly. I will not add any unnecessary text like "[applause]" or other closed captions, per the instructions. I must focus on the vocals only.

Here's the detailed breakdown for the first part: I need to generate timestamps, original text, and English translations. The first segment goes: "I hope you'll consider joining my membership!" and "Today around noon, we added some stamps that members can use, so please try using them in the chat if you'd like.". It continues with a new arowana stamp, which everyone is excited to use. Next, she mentions her new outfit and a special item – a custom cane that has a laser beam function – and I'll make sure to note that she produces a "ヴン ヴン ヴン ヴン..." sound effect! Then she mentions the live show has just started, and she intends to perform with everything she's got. She says the next song and a major announcement are coming and that guests are present. She mentions that the guest part is pre-recorded. Then, "Now, tonight has only just begun. Let's all have fun together! So, here we go!" And that's the end of the talk segment, before the song.

Then, from 02:20, the song "DIVE!" starts, with Juufuutei Raden singing with Hakos Baelz and Oozora Subaru. The song begins with the lyrics "So high, endlessly, it will guide us to tomorrow. I want to shine my own unique light. DIVE!". The translation has to be very natural and keep the original timing. The song continues with themes of confidence, finding one's path, and embracing the future. I need to make sure to get the timing for each voice. The lyrics are: "Losing confidence, just locking up my heart, plugging my ears to the echo of my own voice. The truth is, I always knew deep down...that the most important thing is right here. In this infinitely spreading sky, let's move forward without hesitation." "Even if I close my eyes and try to convince myself, my whole body is racing, my unstoppable heartbeat growing stronger. The future we embraced will become a miracle. The feelings that were born will guide us to tomorrow. I want to shine my own unique light. DIVE!" "Belonging to no one else, I question my heart, heading straight towards the end of the path I chose. No matter when, I won't lose sight of it, because I found the most important place. Even if it's a detour, it's fine. Let's march forward with our heads held high. Louder! Sing Louder! Maybe I'm clumsy, but I don't care if I get hurt. With cloudless feelings, I want to live my pride as myself. Spreading both hands wide, the yesterday we released will become wings. The encounters we layered together..." and I've got it down to the split second. Done. Now let's put it all together.
